title: DTO
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: The CIA urges Iranians to reach out as informants in rare move
items.description: The CIA invited Iranians with "sensitive information" or "unique skills" to contact it.

items.title: Warren calls Trump’s bluff on affordability after State of the Union
items.description: Trump laid blame on Democrats for affordability and argued his administration has solved the problem, as polls consistently show increased concern fro...

items.title: Congress takes on Nvidia, White House as it pushes for chip export limits
items.description: A bipartisan group of lawmakers in both chambers is working to limit advanced chip exports to China.

items.title: Hungary accuses Ukraine of 'oil blockade,' deploys soldiers to key energy facilities
items.description: Hungary has accused Ukraine of disrupting oil supplies it gets from Russia and has stationed troops at critical energy facilities across the country.
